Video.summary: Surfing demands self-involvement, far beyond the ego games man plays with himself with commercial images.
Video.title: Join the Dance - Transformative Film Meditation

Image.alt: Join the Dance - Transformative Film Meditation
Join the Dance - Transformative Film Meditation

Video.summary: This documentary explores how a group of surfers revolutionized surfing in 1975.
Video.title: Bustin' Down The Door

Video.summary: Take a look behind the scenes at the characters involved in Andy Irons: Kissed By God.
Video.title: Andy Irons: Kissed by God - Raw Outtakes

Image.alt: Andy Irons: Kissed by God - Raw Outtakes
Andy Irons: Kissed by God - Raw Outtakes

Video.summary: The artistic and cinematic tale of Jay Phillips, one of Australia's greatest surfing talents.
Video.title: Jay Phillips Isn't Dead

Video.summary: A glimpse into the twisted and hilarious mind of surfer Sterling Spencer.
Video.title: Surf Madness!

Video.summary: Dirty Old Wedge is the real life story of the world's most infamous shorebreak and those who live it
Video.title: Dirty Old Wedge

Video.summary: L E N A documents the purpose and persistent journey of the first German female big wave surfer.
Video.title: LENA

Video.summary: Witness the large waves from Hurricane Marie that were pounding the Southern California coast.
Video.title: A Wedge to Remember

Video.summary: Kelly Slater, Tom Curren, John John Florence and more explore the essence of California's surfing scene.
Video.title: Surfing Golden California

Video.summary: Teen phenom Caroline Marks: pro at 13, now surging and set to represent her country.
Video.title: That's Caroline

Video.summary: He was the world's first Olympic surfing gold medalist. Can the Brazilian surfing sensation Ítalo Ferreira now wrap up the World Surf League Championship Tour title for the second successive time?
Video.title: The Curious Tales of Italo Ferreira

Image.alt: The Curious Tales of Italo Ferreira
The Curious Tales of Italo Ferreira

Video.summary: Is Frank Solomon a kind-hearted surfer or a hard-living bad boy? The man and myth may be inseparable.
Video.title: Let's Be Frank

Video.summary: Sterling discovers what it takes to rise to the top and become one with the ocean.
Video.title: Gold

Video.summary: Shot on16mm film, Return To Zero explores the theme of life, death and reincarnation through a surfboard.
Video.title: Return to Zero

Video.summary: Pros take on Jaws, Hawaii’s legendary wave, made even bigger and wilder by historically big winter weather.
Video.title: Distance Between Dreams

Video.summary: The true spirit of longboarding showcasing that the best waves are the ones you catch with your friends.
Video.title: Awesome Longboard Bros

Video.summary: The story of iconic professional surfers and identical twins CJ & Damien Hobgood. Their sibling rivalry and struggle to each establish their own identity fueled their careers, but ripped their personal and peripheral relationships apart.
Video.title: And Two If By Sea

Video.summary: Showcasing the most famous big wave spots on the planet and the surfers who tackled them.
Video.title: Ground Swell: Epic Stories of Monster Waves

Image.alt: Ground Swell: Epic Stories of Monster Waves
Ground Swell: Epic Stories of Monster Waves

Video.summary: To Be Frank explores authenticity and community in surfing via Frank Paine, a 73-year-old South Bay icon.
Video.title: To Be Frank

Video.summary: Singlefin Yellow tells the story of one surfboards life as it travels the globe shared by a group of friends.
Video.title: SingleFin: Yellow

Video.summary: Kai Lenny balances twin dad life and elite surfing, resetting goals for family and competition.
Video.title: 2023 Reset

Video.summary: Kai Lenny fields a team for Pipeline’s Backdoor Shootout, then tackles The Eddie at Waimea.
Video.title: Pipeline

Video.summary: Mid-season, Kai Lenny heads to Alaska for surf and heli-snow sessions with Travis Rice.
Video.title: Alaska

Video.summary: Ice Edge follows surfers shaping ice boards, battling nature in a poetic tribute to Lofoten.
Video.title: Ice Edge

Video.summary: Kai Lenny, shaped by elite watermen, now aims to be the world’s best big-wave rider.
Video.title: Elite Waterman

Video.summary: Kai Lenny faces the world’s best big-wave surfers at his home break, Peahi, Maui.
Video.title: Big Waves in Maui

Video.summary: Kai Lenny trains in Nazaré, Portugal, with Brazilian big-wave charger Lucas 'Chumbo' Chianca.
Video.title: The Legend of Nazaré

Video.summary: Kai Lenny races at Gigantes de Nazaré, then jets home for a prime day at Peahi (Jaws).
Video.title: Redemption of Nazaré

Video.summary: Nazaré tow event: Kai Lenny and Lucas 'Chumbo' Chianca—Young Bulls—chase a winter win.
Video.title: Chumbo

Video.summary: Classic 2000s surf film with bonus footage of top wave rider Jeff Myers.
Video.title: Destined for Second

Video.summary: In this intimate portrayal of resilience and self-discovery, professional surfer Becca Speak battles to reclaim her identity and return to the waves after a devastating brain injury suffered during a competition.
Video.title: Beyond Normal

Video.summary: Beyond the Green Veil unveils how logging shapes access as surfers and skiers rethink conservation.
Video.title: Beyond the Green Veil
